LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFFS MARIE LEWANDOWSKI, AND EDMUND LEWANDOWSKI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST DEFENDANTS. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED BECAUSE THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT ON MANY ISSUES, INCLUDING THE AMOUNT OF ANY RENT THE DEFENDANT MIGHT OWE, THE PROPORTION OF COSTS THE DEFENDANT MIGHT OWE, AND THE CONDITION OF THE PROPERTY WHEN THE DEFENDANT VACATED. THE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED BECAUSE PLAINTIFFS DID NOT FOLLOW THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AND CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT THAT THEY SEPARATELY DESIGNATE THE ISSUES IN THE MOTION AND SEPARATELY SET OUT EVIDENCE AS TO EACH ISSUE IN THE SEPARATE STATEMENT AND BECAUSE THE ISSUES PLAINTIFFS DESIGNATE IN THEIR BRIEF DO NOT DISPOSE OF ENTIRE CAUSES OF ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS : PLAINTIFFS MARIE LEWANDOWSKI AND EDMUND LEWANDOWSKI'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST DEFENDANTS- MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED BECAUSE THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT ON MANY ISSUES, INCLUDING THE AMOUNT OF ANY RENT THE DEFENDANT MIGHT OWE, THE PROPORTION OF COSTS THE DEFENDANT MIGHT OWE, AND THE CONDITION OF THE PROPERTY WHEN THE DEFENDANT VACATED. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED BECAUSE PLAINTIFFS DID NOT FOLLOW THE REQUIREMENTS OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AND CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT THAT THEY SEPARATELY DESIGNATE THE ISSUES IN THE MOTION AND SEPARATELY SET OUT EVIDENCE AS TO EACH ISSUE IN THE SEPARATE STATEMENT AND BECAUSE THE ISSUES PLAINTIFFS DESIGNATE IN THEIR BRIEF DO NOT DISPOSE OF ENTIRE CAUSES OF ACTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR# 8189 =(301/PJB/PM)
